strengths: 20+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum and demonstrates genuine breadth
Entrepreneurial background: founded GISCollective, contributed to early-stage startups (WatchUp, RIDE Capital), and shipped open-source tooling across multiple ecosystems
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing active pivot toward the role's core focus
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); the role requires recognized, demonstrated AI product or platform leadership, which is not evidenced in the bulk of the career
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no publications, patents, or conference presence in AI/ML — the preferred profile explicitly calls for Master's/PhD and recognized external expertise

Profile is that of a hands-on senior/staff IC with no evidence of director-level responsibilities: no strategic customer advisory work, no cross-org technical vision ownership, and no history of influencing at the executive or partner level
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine engineering depth and entrepreneurial credibility across two decades of polyglot, full-stack work, and his current role shows a real move toward AI tooling. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level, externally-facing position requiring recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory experience, and thought leadership — none of which are meaningfully evidenced in the resume. His AI involvement is too recent and too narrow to substantiate the 'demonstrated AI platforms or products' bar, and there is no signal of the cross-organizational influence or executive-level collaboration the role demands.
